RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/mssql/crsp_next_schemaidgen.tsql
RuleSet.GenFile:
-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_next_schemaidgen$( @NextId smallint output ) as begin if not exists ( select * from $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 where slice_id = $Slice$ ) begin insert into $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 ( slice_id, next_id ) values ( $Slice$, 1 ) end
select @NextId = next_id from $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 where slice_id = $Slice$
update $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg16 set next_id = @NextId + 1 where slice_id = $Slice$ end go
quit

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_next_schemaidgen$( @NextId int output ) as begin if not exists ( select * from $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 where slice_id = $Slice$ ) begin insert into $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 ( slice_id, next_id ) values ( $Slice$, 1 ) end
select @NextId = next_id from $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 where slice_id = $Slice$
update $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg32 set next_id = @NextId + 1 where slice_id = $Slice$ end go
quit

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_next_schemaidgen$( @NextId bigint output ) as begin if not exists ( select * from $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 where slice_id = $Slice$ ) begin insert into $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 ( slice_id, next_id ) values ( $Slice$, 1 ) end
select @NextId = next_id from $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 where slice_id = $Slice$
update $lower DbSchemaName$..$lower DbSchemaName$_idg64 set next_id = @NextId + 1 where slice_id = $Slice$ end go
quit
